codingProjects.title: Coding Projects
codingProjects.subtitle: Browse scaffolded projects, files, and Git status. Run the dev server when you need a live preview.
codingProjects.confirmDeleteProject: Delete this coding project? The database entry will be removed; files on disk are kept.
codingProjects.emptyHint: No projects yet. Create your first scaffolded project to get started.
codingProjects.selectHint: Select a project from the list, or create a new one.

files.chooseFile: Select a file to preview its contents.
files.binaryHint: This file type cannot be previewed as text.

git.title: Repository
git.notRepo: This folder is not a Git repository (or Git metadata is unavailable).
git.noGit: Git is not installed on the server — status cannot be shown.

status.porcelainHint: Git status code: {{code}} (?? = not tracked yet)

run.previewUnavailable: Start the dev server to enable preview.
run.frontendPreviewHint: Frontend dev server with HMR where supported.
run.runToPreview: Run the project to load the preview.
run.logsIdle: Logs appear when the project is running.
run.logsIdleCrashed: Process is not running. If it exited unexpectedly, check the error messages above or try Run again.
run.crashedHint: The last run exited unexpectedly (crashed). Details may appear below once the log stream connects.
